canonical_name: Transmembrane Activator and Calcium-Modulator and Cyclophilin Ligand Interactor
step_rationale: TNF-receptor superfamily member; B-cell and immune activation in plaque.
mechanism: TACI mediates B-cell activation and immunoglobulin production; altered TACI signaling affects adaptive immunity in plaque inflammation and correlates with myocardial injury.

references.title: Using proximity extension proteomics assay to identify biomarkers associated with infarct size and ejection fraction after ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
